title: Here’s what happened in crypto today

briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: Trump crypto company's USD1 stablecoins backing UFC event bonuses
summary: Trump crypto company's USD1 stablecoins backing UFC event bonuses
briefing: A spokesperson for the Democratic National Committee decried the move as “an opportunity to use the power of the presidency to make [Trump] and his family even richer.”

title: Nvidia’s $20 billion debt boom reinforces Bitcoin miners' AI pivot
summary: Nvidia’s $20 billion debt boom reinforces Bitcoin miners' AI pivot
briefing: Nvidia’s planned bond sale reinforces booming AI infrastructure demand, strengthening the case for Bitcoin miners pivoting toward AI data centers.

title: CFTC hires SEC crypto task force adviser with blockchain forensics chops
summary: CFTC hires SEC crypto task force adviser with blockchain forensics chops
briefing: The CFTC staff appointment came amid the US Congress seeking to overhaul federal financial regulators’ roles over digital assets with the CLARITY Act.

title: BitMine boosts ETH holdings closer to $10B as bear market accumulation continues
summary: BitMine boosts ETH holdings closer to $10B as bear market accumulation continues
briefing: BitMine continued buying Ether through the market downturn, growing its stake to nearly 5% of the circulating supply while generating staking yield amid mounting ecosystem challenges.

title: Kraken rolls out perpetual futures for US traders through CFTC-regulated venue
summary: Kraken rolls out perpetual futures for US traders through CFTC-regulated venue
briefing: The offering follows Kraken's acquisition of Bitnomial and comes amid a broader push to bring crypto derivatives trading onshore.

title: These Bitcoin charts show how BTC price could hit $100K before October
summary: These Bitcoin charts show how BTC price could hit $100K before October
briefing: Bitcoin’s double-bottom setup, weekly RSI divergence and whale flows put traders on alert as BTC tests a key breakout zone.

title: Bitcoin analysis warns over BTC price rejection as $67K approaches
summary: Bitcoin analysis warns over BTC price rejection as $67K approaches
briefing: Bitcoin snatched upside liquidity as the US trading session began, but traders warned over a failure to preserve BTC price gains.

title: Elon Musk Loses Again to OpenAI as Judge Dismisses xAI Trade Secret Lawsuit
summary: Elon Musk Loses Again to OpenAI as Judge Dismisses xAI Trade Secret Lawsuit
briefing: A federal judge handed Elon Musk his second defeat against OpenAI after finding xAI failed to show OpenAI improperly obtained confidential info.

summary: Pudgy Penguins NFT Game 'Pudgy Party' Shuts Down Less Than a Year After Launch
briefing: Pudgy Party, a mobile battle royale game, has closed up shop as the Pudgy Penguins team shifts its focus to its Pudgy World experience.

summary: Someone Just Lost $1 Million on Polymarket Over Spain World Cup Shocker

summary: Rio de Janeiro Built an AI Model That Beat DeepSeek—But Was Based on Someone Else's Work
briefing: Rio de Janeiro released a frontier-class AI model that claimed to beat Alibaba's best. Then Nex showed up with receipts.

summary: Anthropic Faces Lawsuit Over Allegedly Misleading Claude AI Pricing

summary: Solana Treasury Firm Forward Industries Keeps Trying to Acquire Rivals—But Nobody's Biting
briefing: Forward Industries has been unsuccessful on all three recent attempts to combine with rival publicly traded Solana treasury firms.
